title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness is a configuration-driven deployment system that abstracts away container, storage, and orchestration setup for AI agents. It enables rapid prototyping via JSON config and system prompts, with built-in support for persistent storage, cross-session memory, hot-swappable models and tools, isolated execution environments, and integration with browser and code interpreter capabilities.
